meta.title: The 100-Year Agenda - A Life Journal
meta.description: The 100-Year Agenda is designed to preserve the story of a lifetime. Track milestones, reflections, and memories with this unique journal. Start years from 1583 to present available.
meta.og_description: To preserve the story of a lifetime. A unique journal for tracking milestones, reflections, and documenting a century-long journey.

hero.title: The 100-Year Agenda
hero.subtitle: To preserve the story of a lifetime.
hero.year_error: The start year must be above 1583.
hero.not_available: This book can be made available on request for free.
hero.lulu_tooltip: Lulu.com is a print-on-demand publishing service

features.why_text:
The 100-Year Agenda is not a planner: it’s a lasting record of a life’s journey. It offers a dedicated space to document the milestones that truly matter — family celebrations, professional successes, health tracking, and personal reflections.

Spanning a full century, this agenda helps you step away from the frenzy of the digital present and reconnect with what is essential.
features.design_text: suitable for use in any language
features.pages_text: featuring a clear, minimal calendar and space for notes.

gift.title: The perfect gift
gift.parents_text: To begin documenting a child’s journey months before birth.
gift.graduation_text: A gift that offers long-term perspective.
gift.wedding_text: A diary for two, shared over a lifetime.
gift.you_text: A space to reflect on the past and tell your story. Or the story of your parents.

order_bottom.title: Start Telling Your Story Today
order_bottom.tip_1: Set a reminder to update it regularly (at least once a year).
order_bottom.tip_2: Have a lot to write? Use a companion notebook — and simply note the page number in your agenda.
order_bottom.tip_3: Keep it in a safe place — it’s precious.
order_bottom.tip_4: Share it with the next generation — they’ll get to know you better.

shipping.title: Shipping & Returns
shipping.intro: The 100-Year Agenda is printed on demand and shipped by our partner Lulu.com.
shipping.rates_text: Shipping costs are calculated at checkout. As a guide, shipping for the US, UK, and EU is approximately 7.00 €.
shipping.times_text:
Production: 3 to 5 business days.
Shipping: 3 to 10 business days depending on the destination.
shipping.returns_text: As a print-on-demand product, returns are only accepted for manufacturing defects or damaged items. Please contact us within 30 days of receipt.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.text: We respect your privacy. This site does not collect any direct personal data. Your payment and shipping information is managed exclusively by Lulu.com when you place your order.
